name: Revel Systems Blog
description: Blog posts and articles from Revel Systems (now part of Shift4 Payments), covering POS technology, restaurant and retail industry insights, product updates, and payment solutions.
note: Revel Systems blog redirects (301) to Shift4 Payments (https://www.shift4.com/food-beverage) following acquisition; no RSS/Atom feed resolves (feed/, rss/ all 301) and the redirect target is a marketing landing page, not a blog index.

feeds.error: 301 off-host redirect to shift4.com/food-beverage (403, marketing page, no blog index)
